passages.text: The Industrial Revolution marked a major turning point in history. Almost every aspect of daily life was (8) --- in some way. For instance, average income and population began to exhibit (9) --- sustained growth. Some economists say that the (10) --- of the Industrial Revolution is the most important event in the history of humanity (11) --- the domestication of animals and plants. This transition included going from hand production methods (12) --- machines.

The Great Barrier Reef is the world's largest coral reef system, composed of over 2,900 individual reefs and 900 islands. It is located in the Coral Sea, off the coast of Queensland, Australia. The reef is so large that it can be seen from outer space and is the world's biggest single structure made by living organisms. However, climate change is the greatest threat to the reef's health. Rising ocean temperatures cause coral bleaching, which occurs when corals expel the algae living in their tissues, turning them white and making them more susceptible to disease.

Cognitive psychology is the scientific study of mental processes such as attention, language use, memory, perception, problem solving, and creativity. Much of the work derived from cognitive psychology has been integrated into various other modern disciplines of psychological study. The discipline was revitalized in the mid-20th century as a response to behaviorism, which scholars argued neglected the internal processes of the mind. Digital technology and the metaphor of the computer as a processor of information further influenced this shift.

options.E: Only a few people were surprised when the team won the championship.

Teacher: Don't forget that your projects are due next Monday.

options.D: Everyone else has already finished their work.

questions.question:

questions.question: Exercise is essential for maintaining a healthy lifestyle. It strengthens the heart, improves circulation, and helps control weight. ---. Therefore, incorporating even a small amount of physical activity into your daily routine can have long-term benefits.
